full_text:
Li Chunxiang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Chunxiang. Concubine of Huang Kui, was executed along with her lover by Cao Cao. Li Chunxiang is a fictional character. Li Chunxiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Chunxiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
